wine_restaurants.name: L'Auberge de l'Ill
wine_restaurants.address: 2 Rue de Collonges au Mont d'Or, 68970 Illhaeusern, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Refined Alsatian gastronomy by Marc Haeberlin, with riverside dining and a deep Alsace and grand cru Burgundy cellar built over 150 years of family hosting
wine_restaurants.description: Haeberlin family riverside inn established 1882 in Illhaeusern, two Michelin stars in 2026. Marc Haeberlin's matelote au Riesling and salmon souffle anchor a deep Alsace wine list.

verified.address_quoted: 2 rue de Collonges au Mont d'Or, Illhaeusern, 68970

wine_restaurants.name: La Table d'Olivier Nasti
wine_restaurants.address: 9-13 Rue du General de Gaulle, 68240 Kaysersberg, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Two-star gastronomic Alsatian cuisine by Meilleur Ouvrier de France Olivier Nasti, championing Vosges game, foie gras and morels with a Riesling-led cellar from sommelier Jean-Baptiste Klein
wine_restaurants.description: Two-Michelin-star gastronomic table inside Hotel Le Chambard, Kaysersberg. Olivier Nasti at the stoves and Jean-Baptiste Klein on the wine list steer a season-led tasting menu around Alsace whites and game.

verified.address_quoted: 9 rue du General de Gaulle, 68240 Kaysersberg

wine_restaurants.name: JY'S
wine_restaurants.address: 3 Allee du Champ de Mars, 68000 Colmar, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Two-star gastronomic restaurant by Jean-Yves Schillinger blending Alsace, New York and Asian influences, paired with a deep Alsace by-the-glass programme
wine_restaurants.description: Jean-Yves Schillinger's two-Michelin-star table in the MGallery hotel, facing Colmar's Champ de Mars park. Cuisine moves through Alsace, Brittany, Japan and the United States.

wine_restaurants.name: Buerehiesel
wine_restaurants.address: 4 Parc de l'Orangerie, 67000 Strasbourg, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern Alsace cuisine in a half-timbered 17th-century farmhouse rebuilt in the Orangerie, chef Eric Westermann pairs frog's-leg schniederspaetle with a strong Alsace cellar
wine_restaurants.description: Half-timbered 17th-century farmhouse in the Orangerie park, chef Eric Westermann earns one Michelin star with frog's-leg schniederspaetle and Alsace-led pairings.

wine_restaurants.name: Au Crocodile
wine_restaurants.address: 10 Rue de l'Outre, 67000 Strasbourg, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Historic Strasbourg gastronomic table refurbished in 2020, chef Romain Brillat (a relative of Brillat-Savarin) cooks one-Michelin-star modern French alongside a sommelier-driven cellar
wine_restaurants.description: Historic Strasbourg house with the eponymous stuffed crocodile, refurbished 2020 and re-starred 2021. Chef Romain Brillat plates one-Michelin-star modern French with Alsace pairings.

wine_restaurants.name: Le 1741
wine_restaurants.address: 22 Quai des Bateliers, 67000 Strasbourg, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: One-Michelin-star modern French cuisine across from the Palais Rohan, chef Jeremy Page and sommelier Michael Wagner build menus around Alsace, Burgundy and Champagne pairings
wine_restaurants.description: Quayside one-Michelin-star restaurant opposite the Palais Rohan, chef Jeremy Page plates precise modern French dishes paired with sommelier Michael Wagner's Alsace-led list.

wine_restaurants.name: Umami
wine_restaurants.address: 8 Rue des Dentelles, 67000 Strasbourg, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: One-Michelin-star fusion of Alsatian tradition and Asian flavours by chef Rene Fieger, paired with a tight cellar of Alsace whites and biodynamic French growers
wine_restaurants.description: Chef Rene Fieger's one-Michelin-star table tucked in the half-timbered Petite France quarter. Market cooking that crosses Alsace and Asia, paired with biodynamic Alsace bottles.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Girardin
wine_restaurants.address: 19 Rue des Tetes, 68000 Colmar, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: One-Michelin-star tasting-only restaurant inside La Maison des Tetes, chef Eric Girardin's 14-seat dining room and minimalist tasting menus paired with a deep Alsace cellar
wine_restaurants.description: Eric Girardin's intimate 14-seat Michelin-star table inside the 1609 Maison des Tetes. Tasting menus at EUR 155 with deep Alsace pairings, set inside the Renaissance landmark.

wine_restaurants.name: Le Feuillage - Hostellerie La Cheneaudiere
wine_restaurants.address: 3 Rue Vieux Moulin, 67420 Colroy-la-Roche, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: One-Michelin-star gastronomic restaurant by Jean-Paul Acker inside the five-star Cheneaudiere Relais et Chateaux, with a forest-and-vineyard tasting menu and a Riesling-deep cellar
wine_restaurants.description: Hostellerie La Cheneaudiere's gastronomic restaurant in the Vosges foothills, where Jean-Paul Acker holds a Michelin star with Vosges foraging and Alsace-led pairings.

verified.address_quoted: 3 rue Vieux Moulin Colroy la Roche 67420

wine_restaurants.name: Le Cerf
wine_restaurants.address: 30 Rue du General de Gaulle, 67520 Marlenheim, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: One-Michelin-star gastronomic table at the gateway of the Route des Vins, four generations of Husser family cuisine paired with a deep local cellar
wine_restaurants.description: First-Michelin-starred 1936 hotel-restaurant at the start of the Route des Vins. Husser family kitchen, classical Alsatian gastronomy with a deep regional cellar.

verified.address_quoted: 30 rue du General de Gaulle, 67520 Marlenheim

wine_restaurants.name: Auberge du Cheval Blanc
wine_restaurants.address: 4 Rue de Wissembourg, 67510 Lembach, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: One-Michelin-star northern-Alsace coaching inn since 1822, chef Pascal Bastian plates classical-meets-modern cuisine inside a four-star Relais property paired with grower Alsace bottles
wine_restaurants.description: Pascal and Carole Bastian's 1822 coaching inn in northern Alsace, one Michelin star. Stuffed morels and Paris-Lembach dessert paired with grower-direct Alsace bottles.

wine_restaurants.name: La Table du Gourmet
wine_restaurants.address: 5 Rue de la 1ere Armee Francaise, 68340 Riquewihr, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: One-Michelin-star and Michelin Green Star restaurant by chef Jean-Luc Brendel in a 16th-century half-timbered house, hyper-seasonal vegetable-driven cuisine and biodynamic Alsace cellar
wine_restaurants.description: Jean-Luc Brendel's one-Michelin-star (and Green Star) restaurant in a 16th-century half-timbered house in Riquewihr. Vegetable-led tasting menus and biodynamic Alsace pairings.

verified.address_quoted: 5 rue de la 1e Armee Francaise, Riquewihr

wine_restaurants.name: Wistub Brenner
wine_restaurants.address: 1 Rue de Turenne, 68000 Colmar, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Traditional Alsatian winstub in Colmar's Petite Venise quarter, choucroute, baeckeoffe and braised pork knuckle with a deep Alsace by-the-glass list
wine_restaurants.description: Riverside winstub in Petite Venise pouring an Alsace-only wine list alongside Papi Lucien's onion tart, choucroute and pork knuckle braised in Pinot Noir.

wine_restaurants.name: Maison Kammerzell
wine_restaurants.address: 16 Place de la Cathedrale, 67000 Strasbourg, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Historic 16th-century brasserie at the foot of the cathedral, regional Alsatian cuisine and three fish choucroute with an Alsace and Cremant-led list
wine_restaurants.description: Carved 1589 sandstone house at the foot of Strasbourg cathedral, brasserie-restaurant famous for its three-fish choucroute and Alsace-led wine list with cellar by the glass.

wine_restaurants.name: Wistub de la Petite Venise
wine_restaurants.address: 4 Rue de la Poissonnerie, 68000 Colmar, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Family-run winstub in Petite Venise serving Alsatian classics, onion tart and choucroute with an Alsace-anchored wine list
wine_restaurants.description: Half-timbered winstub on Rue de la Poissonnerie in Colmar's Petite Venise, classic Alsace onion tart, baeckeoffe and choucroute paired with grower Riesling and Pinot Gris.

wine_restaurants.name: Wistub du Sommelier
wine_restaurants.address: 51 Grand Rue, 68750 Bergheim, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Sommelier-led winstub by Patrick Schneider in fortified Bergheim, deeply regional menu paired with a studious by-the-glass programme
wine_restaurants.description: Patrick Schneider's sommelier-led winstub on Bergheim's Grand Rue. Alsatian classics paired with a tightly curated by-the-glass list of grower Riesling and Pinot Gris.

wine_restaurants.name: Caveau Morakopf
wine_restaurants.address: 7 Rue des Trois Epis, 68230 Niedermorschwihr, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Husband-and-wife winstub in single-street Niedermorschwihr, chef Lukas Edl plays on Alsatian tradition with Austrian touches and an Alsace-only wine list including Cuvee Morakopf
wine_restaurants.description: Stained-glass winstub in Niedermorschwihr, chef Lukas Edl and Celine pair Alsatian tradition with Vienna touches and a Morakopf blend of Pinot Blanc, Pinot Gris and Gewurztraminer.

wine_restaurants.name: Le Caveau d'Eguisheim
wine_restaurants.address: 1 Place du Chateau Saint-Leon, 68420 Eguisheim, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Regional Alsace dining inside a 16th-century house on Eguisheim's main square, chef Alexandre Niggel cooks coq au Riesling and baeckeoffe with a tightly local wine list
wine_restaurants.description: 16th-century house on Eguisheim's Place du Chateau Saint-Leon, chef Alexandre Niggel plates Alsatian classics paired with Eguisheim and Pfaffenheim grower bottles.

wine_restaurants.name: Hostellerie Schwendi
wine_restaurants.address: 2 Place Schwendi, 68240 Kientzheim, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Family-run Kientzheim hostellerie with an 18th-century vaulted cellar dining room, Alsatian gastronomic menu paired with estate-produced Schille-Gisie Alsace bottles
wine_restaurants.description: Family-run Kientzheim hostellerie on Place Schwendi, gastronomic Alsace cuisine inside an 18th-century vaulted cellar paired with the Schille-Gisie family Alsace bottles.

wine_restaurants.name: Winstub Au Tire-Bouchon
wine_restaurants.address: 29 Rue du General de Gaulle, 68340 Riquewihr, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Zimmer family winstub in central Riquewihr, traditional tartes flambees, fish choucroute and foie gras paired with the estate's Schoenenbourg Riesling and Gewurztraminer
wine_restaurants.description: Zimmer-family winstub on Riquewihr's main street since the early 1970s. Tartes flambees, fish choucroute and foie gras paired with estate Schoenenbourg Riesling.

verified.address_quoted: 29 rue du General de Gaulle, 68340 Riquewihr

wine_restaurants.name: Au Pont de l'Ill
wine_restaurants.address: 2 Rue du General Leclerc, 67610 La Wantzenau, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Family-run gastronomic restaurant since 1987 in a half-timbered house north of Strasbourg, known for its seafood counter and an Alsace-anchored cellar of grower-direct bottles
wine_restaurants.description: Half-timbered family restaurant just north of Strasbourg since 1987, known for its seafood counter and an Alsace-anchored wine list of grower bottles and Cremants.
